source.name: Nebraska Certificate of Taxes Levied (CTL)
source.notes: Extracted from annual avgrat sheets. County rows include total value, property taxes levied, and average tax rate. 2026 is omitted because CTL data is not certified yet.

fields.totalValue: Total property value reported on CTL annual sheet
fields.taxesLevied: Total property taxes levied reported on CTL annual sheet
fields.averageTaxRate: Average tax rate as decimal, e.g. 0.014738 = 1.4738%
